name: vicinae-yubikey-code
title: YubiKey Code
description: Get OTP codes from a YubiKey using ykoath or ykman
author: storm

commands.name: get-code
commands.title: Get OTP Code
commands.subtitle: YubiKey
commands.description: Copy, paste, or reveal OTP codes from your YubiKey

preferences.name: ykmanPath
preferences.title: ykman Path
preferences.description: Optional path to the ykman executable. Leave empty to use ykman from PATH.

preferences.name: ykoathPath
preferences.title: ykoath Path
preferences.description: Optional path to the ykoath executable. Leave empty to use ykoath from PATH.

preferences.name: backend
preferences.title: Backend
preferences.description: Choose the OTP backend. Auto uses the Rust helper first and falls back to ykman.

preferences.name: primaryAction
preferences.title: Primary Action
preferences.description: Choose the default action for OTP codes.

preferences.name: debugLogging
preferences.title: Debug Logging
preferences.label: Enable debug logging
preferences.description: Log timing details for account loading, OTP fetching, and backend subprocesses. Development sessions always log these details.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
